mapper.sql:
COALESCE(likes.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(comments.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount,
CASE WHEN my_like.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS likedByMe, CASE WHEN my_bookmark.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS bookmarkedByMe, CASE WHEN p.user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS mine
FALSE AS likedByMe, FALSE AS bookmarkedByMe, FALSE AS mine

JOIN APP_USER u ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN PLACE pl ON pl.place_id = p.place_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM COMMUNITY_POST_LIKE GROUP BY post_id ) likes ON likes.post_id = p.post_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM `COMMENT` WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY post_id ) comments ON comments.post_id = p.post_id
LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_POST_LIKE my_like ON my_like.post_id = p.post_id AND my_like.user_id = #{currentUserId} LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_POST_BOOKMARK my_bookmark ON my_bookmark.post_id = p.post_id AND my_bookmark.user_id = #{currentUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM PLACE WHERE place_id = #{placeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_POST ( user_id, place_id, category, title, content, image_url, status ) VALUES ( #{post.userId}, #{post.placeId}, #{post.category}, #{post.title}, #{post.content}, #{post.imageUrl}, 'ACTIVE' )

INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_POST_CELL ( post_id, sort_order, cell_type, text_content, image_url, alignment, font_size_px, bold ) VALUES
( #{postId}, #{cell.sortOrder}, #{cell.cellType}, #{cell.textContent}, #{cell.imageUrl}, #{cell.alignment}, #{cell.fontSizePx}, #{cell.bold} )
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorNickname, p.place_id AS placeId, pl.place_name AS placeName, p.category AS category, p.title AS title, CASE WHEN p.content IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(p.content) > 100 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(p.content, 1, 100), '...') ELSE p.content END AS excerpt, p.image_url AS imageUrl, COALESCE(likes.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(comments.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt,
CASE WHEN my_like.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS likedByMe, CASE WHEN my_bookmark.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS bookmarkedByMe, CASE WHEN p.user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS mine
FALSE AS likedByMe, FALSE AS bookmarkedByMe, FALSE AS mine
FROM COMMUNITY_POST p
WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND p.category = #{category}
AND ( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.place_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY likeCount DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.post_id DESC
ORDER BY commentCount DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.post_id DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.post_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorNickname, p.trip_id AS tripId, p.place_id AS placeId, pl.place_name AS placeName, p.category AS category, p.title AS title, p.content AS content, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt,
FROM COMMUNITY_POST p
WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT post_cell_id AS postCellId, post_id AS postId, sort_order AS sortOrder, cell_type AS cellType, text_content AS textContent, image_url AS imageUrl, alignment AS alignment, font_size_px AS fontSizePx, bold AS bold FROM COMMUNITY_POST_CELL WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, post_cell_id ASC
SELECT image_url FROM COMMUNITY_POST_CELL WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND cell_type = 'IMAGE' AND image_url IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET place_id = #{post.placeId}, category = #{post.category}, title = #{post.title}, content = #{post.content}, image_url = #{post.imageUrl}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{post.postId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO COMMUNITY_POST_BOOKMARK (post_id, user_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorNickname, p.place_id AS placeId, pl.place_name AS placeName, p.category AS category, p.title AS title, CASE WHEN p.content IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(p.content) > 100 THEN CONCAT(SUBSTRING(p.content, 1, 100), '...') ELSE p.content END AS excerpt, p.image_url AS imageUrl, COALESCE(likes.like_count, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(comments.comment_count, 0) AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt, CASE WHEN my_like.post_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS likedByMe, TRUE AS bookmarkedByMe, CASE WHEN p.user_id = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS mine FROM COMMUNITY_POST_BOOKMARK bookmark JOIN COMMUNITY_POST p ON p.post_id = bookmark.post_id AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' JOIN APP_USER u ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN PLACE pl ON pl.place_id = p.place_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS like_count FROM COMMUNITY_POST_LIKE GROUP BY post_id ) likes ON likes.post_id = p.post_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM `COMMENT` WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY post_id ) comments ON comments.post_id = p.post_id LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_POST_LIKE my_like ON my_like.post_id = p.post_id AND my_like.user_id = #{userId} WHERE bookmark.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bookmark.created_at DESC, p.post_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.commenter_user_id AS commenterUserId, CASE WHEN c.status = 'DELETED' THEN '삭제된 댓글' ELSE u.nickname END AS authorNickname, c.parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId, CASE WHEN parent.status = 'DELETED' THEN '삭제된 댓글' ELSE parent_user.nickname END AS replyToNickname, CASE WHEN c.status = 'DELETED' THEN '삭제된 댓글입니다.' ELSE c.content END AS content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, CASE WHEN c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND c.commenter_user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS mine, CASE WHEN c.status = 'DELETED' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS deleted, CASE WHEN c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.updated_at > c.created_at THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS edited FROM `COMMENT` c JOIN APP_USER u ON u.user_id = c.commenter_user_id LEFT JOIN `COMMENT` parent ON parent.comment_id = c.parent_comment_id LEFT JOIN APP_USER parent_user ON parent_user.user_id = parent.commenter_user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND ( c.status = 'ACTIVE' OR ( c.status = 'DELETED' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `COMMENT` child WHERE child.parent_comment_id = c.comment_id AND child.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'DELETED') ) ) ) ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.comment_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `COMMENT` ( post_id, commenter_user_id, parent_comment_id, content, status ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{content}, 'ACTIVE' )
